questions: The `createShotWithGenerationsPath` is also called from the timeline agent edge function flow (per `shotCreationPaths.ts` being imported in agent contexts). Does the new RPC need to work with service_role calls from edge functions? The current auth check allows service_role bypass, so this should be fine — but want to confirm the agent flow uses service_role.

Should the new RPC handle the `position` parameter explicitly (like `insert_shot_at_position` does, shifting existing shots), or is appending to end (MAX+1) sufficient for the multi-generation path? The current `createShotWithGenerationsPath` doesn't pass position to `createShot`.

The existing test at line 169 expects `includeShots: true` but the actual code at line 139 has `includeShots: false`. Is this test currently passing, or is it already broken/stale? This affects whether updating the test is a fix or a behavioral change.

success_criteria.criterion: New `create_shot_with_generations` RPC exists and atomically creates shot + N shot_generations rows + parent generation in one transaction
RPC respects timeline_frame unique partial index by assigning 0, 50, 100, ... spacing
RPC calls `ensure_shot_parent_generation` for the new shot
RPC includes auth check matching create_shot_with_image pattern (service_role bypass + user ownership)
The 1500ms setTimeout hack in createShotWithGenerationsPath is removed
createShotWithGenerationsPath makes exactly 1 RPC call instead of 1 + N serial calls
Shot appears in UI with correct thumbnails immediately after creation (no empty-then-fill flicker)
All existing tests in shotCreationPaths.test.ts pass (updated as needed)
Cache entry includes computed fields (imageCount, positionedImageCount, etc.) matching useListShots shape
upsertShotInCache helper is reusable and inserts at correct sorted position
No new files created beyond the migration SQL file
Manual smoke test: create shot from 3+ selected gallery images, thumbnails visible immediately
Manual smoke test: rapid shot creation does not cause shots to disappear from list

assumptions: Appending shots to end (MAX position + 1) is sufficient for the multi-generation path — no need for insert-at-position semantics since the current code doesn't pass a position parameter

The caller of createShotWithGenerationsPath has the generation IDs but NOT preview data (imageUrl/thumbUrl) for each generation — we'll look up cached generation data from React Query or fall back to letting the background invalidation fill it in
The timeline agent edge function flow uses service_role, so the new RPC's auth check (which allows service_role bypass) will work for that path
The existing create_shot_with_image (singular) path does NOT need to change — it already works correctly with atomic cache updates
The createShotWithFilesPath and createEmptyShotPath do NOT need changes — only createShotWithGenerationsPath is affected
The RPC returns jsonb (not TABLE) to accommodate the variable-length shot_generations array in a single return row
